title: Cancer and long COVID
body:
My allergist/immunologist has stressed to me that those of us with a history of cancer are more likely to develop long COVID, even if our COVID symptoms were mild.
    He told me to be sure to take Paxlovid at the onset of COVID and also to take metformin for 2 weeks. 
     To help prevent getting COVID in the first place, of course getting the vaccine is the first thing to do. But also taking Astelin nose spray before going into crowds can be helpful to prevent getting COVID. The effects last about 4 hours.
